description: Visualize clusters created with the SOM algorithm
author: Ken Ross, Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## SOMClusterViewer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SOMClusterViewer is a GenePattern module that Visualize clusters created with the SOM algorithm

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 1 parameters:
- Required: som.cluster.filename
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>somviewer.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.modules.som.SOM <som.cluster.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation
